name: Disabling Multi Factor Authentication
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Splunk Threat Research Team (original rule), Harjot Singh @cyb3rjy0t (sigma rule)
SIGMA Title: Disabling Multi Factor Authentication
SIGMA Description: Detects disabling of Multi Factor Authentication.

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disable strong authentication.%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Disabling Multi Factor Authentication on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%disable strong authentication.%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Disabling Multi Factor Authentication

This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
